subcodes.first_line: We have sent down the Book of Names from the heaven of God's Will, the Creator of the heavens, and therein have We given unto the world these glad-tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انزلنا کتاب الاسماء من سماء مشیه الله فاطر السماء و فیه بشرنا العالم بهذا
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
